response:
SPECS
MANY EXPERTS SPECULATE THAT MOORE'S LAW WILL EFFECTIVELY END BY THE LATE 2020S OR EARLY 2030S AS PHYSICAL LIMITS OF TRANSISTOR SHRINKING ARE REACHED.
***
SPECS
ALTERNATIVELY SOME BELIEVE THE LAW WILL NOT STOP BUT WILL EVOLVE THROUGH NEW MATERIALS LIKE GRAPHENE OR THREE DIMENSIONAL ARCHITECTURES THAT CONTINUE THE TREND OF COMPUTATIONAL GROWTH.
